series_metadata.series_title: Documents related to goods or services
series_metadata.series_description: Direct Purchase Order and/or requisitions, and any supporting documentation related to the purchase of goods and/or services.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain four (4) years after close of fiscal year in which created then destroy, once all audits are completed and any discrepancies corrected. ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years after close of fiscal year in which created then destroy, once all audits are completed and any discrepancies corrected., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
